title: Thane、Maharashtra — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]

概述

Thane是Maharashtra的一个城市，人口约1,900,000。A rapidly growing satellite city of Mumbai, known for its lakes, green spaces, and as a major residential and commercial hub.
